headline: $5.8 Billion in Buybacks—But What Did Avis Stock Actually Buy?
summary: Avis Budget sent a torrent of cash back to its owners, but a look at the stock chart raises a sharp question about what that money truly bought.

raw.headline: $5.8 Billion in Buybacks—But What Did Avis Stock Actually Buy?
raw.summary: Avis Budget sent a torrent of cash back to its owners, but a look at the stock chart raises a sharp question about what that money truly bought.

headline: Lyft CEO on surge pricing, robotaxis, and Bezos
summary: Lyft CEO David Risher unpacks his playbook with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi for turning the rideshare giant around, from ending traditional surge pricing and mandating a return-to-office, to building a hybrid future of human drivers and Waymo robotaxis.

raw.headline: Lyft CEO on surge pricing, robotaxis, and Bezos
raw.summary: Lyft CEO David Risher unpacks his playbook with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi for turning the rideshare giant around, from ending traditional surge pricing and mandating a return-to-office, to building a hybrid future of human drivers and Waymo robotaxis.

headline: Fundsmith Equity Fund: H1 2026 Purchases
summary: Fundsmith Equity Fund was down by 2.9% in the first 6 months of the year, 14.1 percentage points less than what is perhaps the most obvious comparator, the MSCI World Index (Â£ net).
